name: Daily One Card
description: The macro energy of the day as a psychological mirror.

positions.name: Energy of the Day
positions.meaning: The dominant energy and inner theme accompanying you today

name: Cause and Effect
description: A cause-to-effect narrative for a concrete situation, ending in actionable advice.

positions.name: Cause
positions.meaning: The root dynamic that created the current situation

positions.name: Effect
positions.meaning: How that dynamic manifests in the situation now

positions.name: Advice
positions.meaning: The concrete action or stance the reading recommends

name: Reflection Cross
description: A cross-shaped self-examination of behavior patterns, shadow aspects and emotional triggers.

positions.name: Core
positions.meaning: The central inner state under examination

positions.name: Behavior Patterns
positions.meaning: The recurring behavior the querent keeps repeating

positions.name: Shadow Side
positions.meaning: What is denied, hidden or projected onto others

positions.name: Emotional Triggers
positions.meaning: What sets off the pattern and feeds the shadow

positions.name: Outcome / Lesson
positions.meaning: The lesson this configuration is asking to be learned

name: Deep Intuitive
description: Expert mode: a dense seven-card reading weaving past foundations, hidden currents and direction.
warning: This spread produces a dense, multi-layered reading that can be cognitively overwhelming. Confirm the querent is ready; otherwise suggest the 3-card or 5-card spread instead.

positions.name: Heart of the Question
positions.meaning: What the question is really about beneath its wording

positions.name: Past Foundation
positions.meaning: The root in the past that still feeds the situation

positions.name: Hidden Influences
positions.meaning: Currents at work that the querent does not consciously see

positions.name: Conscious Focus
positions.meaning: What the querent believes the situation is about

positions.name: Obstacle
positions.meaning: The main resistance standing in the way

positions.name: Advice
positions.meaning: The stance or action the cards point toward

positions.name: Likely Direction
positions.meaning: Where the current course leads if nothing changes

name: Celtic Cross
description: The classic ten-card deep dive into a situation and its trajectory.

positions.name: General Atmosphere
positions.meaning: The overall energy surrounding the situation

positions.name: Opposing Forces
positions.meaning: What crosses or challenges the situation

positions.name: Foundation
positions.meaning: The distant past and root causes beneath the situation

positions.name: Recent Past
positions.meaning: What is just leaving or has recently shaped events

positions.name: Possible Future
positions.meaning: What may come if current energies unfold

positions.name: Near Future
positions.meaning: What is about to enter the situation

positions.name: Querent's Attitude
positions.meaning: How the querent positions themselves in the situation

positions.name: Environment
positions.meaning: The influence of people and circumstances around the querent

positions.name: Hopes and Fears
positions.meaning: What the querent hopes for and dreads, often intertwined

positions.name: Final Outcome
positions.meaning: The synthesis toward which the whole reading points

name: Horoscope
description: One card for each of the twelve astrological houses, mapping every life area.

positions.name: 1st House
positions.meaning: Self, identity and outward presence

positions.name: 2nd House
positions.meaning: Resources, money and personal values

positions.name: 3rd House
positions.meaning: Communication, siblings and immediate surroundings

positions.name: 4th House
positions.meaning: Home, family and inner roots

positions.name: 5th House
positions.meaning: Creativity, pleasure and romance

positions.name: 6th House
positions.meaning: Work, routines and health

positions.name: 7th House
positions.meaning: Partnerships and one-to-one relationships

positions.name: 8th House
positions.meaning: Transformation, shared resources and endings

positions.name: 9th House
positions.meaning: Beliefs, learning and distant horizons

positions.name: 10th House
positions.meaning: Career, reputation and public role

positions.name: 11th House
positions.meaning: Friends, community and future hopes

positions.name: 12th House
positions.meaning: The subconscious, the hidden and what is being released

name: Tree of Life
description: One card for each of the ten Sephiroth, reading the situation across the Kabbalistic tree.

positions.name: Kether
positions.meaning: The spiritual essence and highest purpose of the matter

positions.name: Chokmah
positions.meaning: The raw creative force driving it

positions.name: Binah
positions.meaning: The structure, limits and understanding shaping it

positions.name: Chesed
positions.meaning: Where expansion, generosity and opportunity flow

positions.name: Geburah
positions.meaning: Where discipline, severity or necessary cutting acts

positions.name: Tiphareth
positions.meaning: The heart of the matter and its point of balance

positions.name: Netzach
positions.meaning: Desires, emotions and instinctive drives

positions.name: Hod
positions.meaning: Thoughts, words and how the matter is rationalized

positions.name: Yesod
positions.meaning: The subconscious foundation and imagination beneath it

positions.name: Malkuth
positions.meaning: How it all lands in material, everyday reality
